meaning: n.参议员,(大学的)评议员,(古罗马的)元老院议员
examples: The senator was invited but was unable to attend.
I am astounded at the comments made by the Senator.
The senator was accused of waffling on major issues.
Senator Arlen Specter has scheduled a Judiciary Committee hearing for a week from today.
Eventually, Californians convinced one of their representatives, Senator John Conness, to translate rhetoric to action.
